subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh of thy Lord's bounties! To recount the divine favours consisteth in this: that man should dedicate his life unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تحدث بنعمه ربه تحدث بنعمت الهیه اینست که انسان حیات خویش را بجهت آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
